title: whetū — a zero-config status line and history picker in Zig
excerpt: One binary, no config file. Git state, 39 toolchains and a syntax-highlighted history picker, in about 2 ms.
content_html:
~/install

Two ways

Download the binary. Grab the tarball for your platform, check it against the published SHA256SUMS, and put it on your PATH. Then add one line to your shell config.

$ sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS --ignore-missing && tar -xzf whetuu-*.tar.gz && mv whetuu ~/.local/bin/

Tarballs and checksums are on the releases page, for macOS and Linux on x86-64 and ARM64.

Or run the installer. It does the same thing, and saves you a uname. It detects your platform, verifies the download, puts the binary in ~/.local/bin, and adds the init line to the config of the shell you actually use. Running it twice changes nothing.

$ curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -fsSL https://yamafaktory.github.io/whetuu/install.sh | sh

Read the script first if you would rather not pipe to a shell. It verifies nothing you could not verify yourself.

Then open a new shell. That is the whole install.

Would rather edit your own dotfiles? Run it with WHETUU_NO_MODIFY=1 and it prints the lines instead of writing them. whetuu init <shell> prints them too, along with the file they belong in. A PATH line appears only when ~/.local/bin is not already on your PATH.

Needs a Nerd Font. whetuu draws the git branch, the language logos and the star with Nerd Font glyphs. Most terminal setups already run one, so try it first. If the star and the branch glyph come out as empty boxes, switch your terminal font.

Uninstalling

One line for the program, one for the data. The history store and the version cache live under the XDG directories rather than next to the binary, so removing whetuu never takes your history with it. Run whetuu paths first if you want to see both locations, in case $XDG_DATA_HOME or $XDG_CACHE_HOME moves them on your machine.

$ rm ~/.local/bin/whetuu && rm -rf ~/.local/share/whetuu ~/.cache/whetuu

Then delete the # whetuu block from your shell config.

~/demo

See it in a real shell

The status line tracks the branch, the git status and the toolchain version. Pressing the up arrow opens the history picker, which filters as you type and runs what you pick.

demo

~/modules

What it shows

Left to right, each segment appears only when it is relevant.

user_host
user@host in bold green, but only over SSH or when you are root, and then in bold red as a warning.

directory
The current directory with $HOME collapsed to ~. Keeps the anchor plus as many trailing directories as fit the width.

git branch
Branch glyph and current branch, or (detached), in magenta.

git state
Any operation underway, in yellow: (rebasing 2/7), (merging), (cherry-picking). Read straight from .git, with no extra subprocess.

git status
Conflicts, stashes, staged, modified, untracked, ahead and behind, in one bracketed group.

language
Logo and toolchain version in the brand colour, for 39 languages and tools. Detected from a project manifest, a source file extension, or an infra marker.

cmd_duration
Timer glyph and elapsed time, when the last command ran for two seconds or more.

character
A star, purple by default or in the language brand colour. Turns red after a failed command.

~/picker

A history picker on the up arrow

Commands are recorded once they finish, and only when they exited cleanly, so typos never enter the store. Each is stored with the directory it ran in. The picker opens scoped to the current directory and falls back to all history when there is none. The command that just broke is the one exception. It sits at the top in red until you run another command, so you can pick it and fix it. It is never stored.

whetuu history

2d git commit -m "Cache toolchain versions" 1d cd ~/cf/platform && git push -u origin HEAD 17h docker exec -i PGPASSWORD=x db psql 14m nvim ~/.config/fish/config.fish 11m npm ci 󰦥

Rows are syntax highlighted. The command name, flags, paths, variables, quoted strings and operators each take a colour from your terminal theme, so the picker matches the palette you already run. A command too wide for the window loses its middle to a … rather than its end, which keeps a run of commands sharing one long prefix apart.

  • typeFilter. Every word must match, ignoring case.
  • ↑ / ↓Move the selection. Up goes further back in time.
  • Ctrl+GSwitch between this directory's history and all of it.
  • TabCopy the selection into the search field to edit or extend. Enter then runs what you typed.
  • EnterRun the selection, or the text you typed after a Tab. Moving the selection goes back to running it.
  • EscCancel, leaving whatever you had typed on the command line.

~/commands

Nothing to run day to day

The shell hook drives everything and the picker is on the up arrow, so two of these are called for you and you never type them. This is the whole command surface.

CommandDoes
whetuuPrint the command list.
whetuu --versionPrint the version.
whetuu init <fish|bash|zsh>Print the shell integration script, meant to be sourced or evaled. Prints the setup line instead when run straight into a terminal.
whetuu renderRender one status line. Called by the shell hook, not by you.
whetuu historyOpen the interactive history picker.
whetuu history add -- <command>Record a finished command. Called by the shell hook.
whetuu pathsPrint where the history store and version cache live, and whether each file exists yet.

render and history add take flags that only the init scripts pass, namely exit status, duration and width. That is why they are left out here.

A fresh install has neither file. whetuu paths marks the missing one rather than hiding it, until the first command is recorded and the first toolchain version is cached. With neither $HOME nor the matching XDG variable set it says so, because then whetuu has nowhere to write.

~/performance

Renders in about 2 ms

A status line runs before every command, which makes it the one thing in your shell that has to be quick. Every module that reads the disk runs at the same time via std.Io, so a render takes about as long as its slowest probe rather than the sum of them all.

DirectoryRenderFor comparison
No repo, no toolchain2.3 ms—
Zig repo, 35 files3.0 mszig version alone: 3.1 ms
Monorepo, 8259 files20.2 msgit status alone: 19.3 ms

Measured with hyperfine --warmup 40 --runs 400 on a 13th gen i9-13900H, ReleaseFast, pinned to the performance cores on an otherwise idle machine. In the monorepo the whole status line takes about as long as git status on its own.

A slow repository cannot hang your shell. Both subprocesses are bounded. Git gets 250 ms and the toolchain probe gets 200 ms, and they run at the same time, so the worst case is the larger of the two. Given a git that hangs for 30 seconds, the status line still returns in 257 ms. It simply drops the git segment.

A big history does not slow the picker. The up arrow reads the most recent few megabytes rather than the whole store, so it opens in about 20 ms on a store of 70 MB just as it does on one of 400 KB. Nothing is deleted to keep it that way. Years of history stay on disk.

~/security

Nothing leaves your machine

A status line sees every command you run, and the picker keeps them. That is a lot to hand a small tool, so here is exactly what whetuu does and does not do.

No network
There is no socket, no HTTP client and no sync anywhere in the binary. No telemetry and no update check. There is no account and no server to opt out of.

Two files
Running, whetuu writes exactly two. The history store, created with mode 600 and reset to it on every write, so one left readable by an older version corrects itself. And a cache of toolchain version strings at ~/.cache/whetuu/versions, which holds nothing else and can be deleted whenever you like.

Spec paths only
The binary goes in ~/.local/bin, the history store under $XDG_DATA_HOME and the version cache under $XDG_CACHE_HOME. No directory of our own in your $HOME. whetuu paths prints both data locations.

One install edit
The installer appends the init line to the config of the shell in $SHELL, and nothing else. Not the config of a shell you do not use, and never twice. A PATH line joins it only when ~/.local/bin is not already on your PATH. WHETUU_NO_MODIFY=1 makes it print them instead.

Skip a command
Start a command with a space and it is never recorded. Use it for the ones carrying a token. Only successful commands are stored at all.

No shell, ever
whetuu runs two subprocesses: git and the toolchain version probe. Both get a fixed list of arguments rather than a command line, so nothing you type is ever interpreted as a command. State like a rebase in progress is read straight out of .git with no subprocess at all.

Escapes defanged
Every control byte in a command, a branch name or a directory becomes a ? before it reaches your terminal. A repository you just cloned cannot repaint your screen or move your cursor through whetuu.

Nothing to configure
No config file means no config parser, no theme format and nothing of yours being executed at startup. The attack surface is the binary and the two commands above.

One caveat
The language module picks which toolchain to probe from the files in the current directory, so entering an untrusted repository can make whetuu run something like node --version. It runs whatever your PATH resolves, never a binary from the repository.

Checkable downloads
The Linux builds are static musl with no runtime dependencies, and every release ships a SHA256SUMS file. The source is on GitHub and builds from it with one command.

blocks.html_en: Commands are recorded once they finish, and only when they exited cleanly, so typos never enter the store. Each is stored with the directory it ran in. The picker opens scoped to the current directory and falls back to all history when there is none. The command that just broke is the one exception. It sits at the top in red until you run another command, so you can pick it and fix it. It is never stored.

blocks.html_en: A status line runs before every command, which makes it the one thing in your shell that has to be quick. Every module that reads the disk runs at the same time via std.Io, so a render takes about as long as its slowest probe rather than the sum of them all.

sentences.en: Every module that reads the disk runs at the same time via std.Io, so a render takes about as long as its slowest probe rather than the sum of them all.
sentences.zh: 每个读取磁盘的模块都通过 std.Io 同时运行，因此渲染所需的时间大约与其最慢的探测时间相同，而不是它们的总和。

blocks.html_en: A slow repository cannot hang your shell. Both subprocesses are bounded. Git gets 250 ms and the toolchain probe gets 200 ms, and they run at the same time, so the worst case is the larger of the two. Given a git that hangs for 30 seconds, the status line still returns in 257 ms. It simply drops the git segment.

sentences.en: A slow repository cannot hang your shell.
sentences.zh: 缓慢的存储库无法挂起您的 shell。

sentences.en: Both subprocesses are bounded.
sentences.zh: 两个子流程都是有界的。

sentences.en: Git gets 250 ms and the toolchain probe gets 200 ms, and they run at the same time, so the worst case is the larger of the two.
sentences.zh: Git 需要 250 毫秒，工具链探针需要 200 毫秒，并且它们同时运行，因此最坏的情况是两者中较大的一个。

sentences.en: Given a git that hangs for 30 seconds, the status line still returns in 257 ms.
sentences.zh: 假设 git 挂起 30 秒，状态行仍会在 257 毫秒内返回。

sentences.en: It simply drops the git segment.
sentences.zh: 它只是删除 git 段。

sentences.en: Nothing is deleted to keep it that way.

sentences.en: Years of history stay on disk.
sentences.zh: 多年的历史记录保留在磁盘上。

blocks.html_en:
Two files
Running, whetuu writes exactly two. The history store, created with mode 600 and reset to it on every write, so one left readable by an older version corrects itself. And a cache of toolchain version strings at ~/.cache/whetuu/versions, which holds nothing else and can be deleted whenever you like.

sentences.en: The history store, created with mode 600 and reset to it on every write, so one left readable by an older version corrects itself.
sentences.zh: 历史存储是使用模式 600 创建的，并在每次写入时重置为该历史存储，因此旧版本可读的历史存储会自行更正。

sentences.en: And a cache of toolchain version strings at ~/.cache/whetuu/versions, which holds nothing else and can be deleted whenever you like.
sentences.zh: 工具链版本字符串的缓存位于 ~/.cache/whetuu/versions，它不包含任何其他内容，并且可以随时删除。

content_html_zh:
〜/安装

两种方式

下载二进制文件。 获取适合您平台的 tarball，根据已发布的 SHA256SUMS 检查它，然后将其放在您的 PATH 中。 然后将一行添加到您的 shell 配置中。

$sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS --ignore-missing && tar -xzf whetuu-*.tar.gz && mv whetuu ~/.local/bin/

Tarball 和校验和位于发布页面，适用于 x86-64 和 ARM64 上的 macOS 和 Linux。

或者运行安装程序。 它做同样的事情，并为你节省一个 uname。 它会检测您的平台，验证下载，将二进制文件放入 ~/.local/bin 中，并将 init 行添加到您实际使用的 shell 的配置中。 运行两次没有任何改变。

$curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -fsSL https://yamafaktory.github.io/whetuu/install.sh |嘘

如果您不想通过管道连接到 shell，请先阅读该脚本。 它可以验证您自己无法验证的任何内容。

然后打开一个新的外壳。 这就是整个安装过程。

宁愿编辑您自己的点文件吗？ 使用 WHETUU_NO_MODIFY=1 运行它，它会打印这些行而不是写入它们。 whetuu init <shell> 也会打印它们以及它们所属的文件。 仅当 ~/.local/bin 不在您的 PATH 中时才会出现 PATH 行。

需要一个书呆子字体。 whetuu 用 Nerd Font 字形绘制 git 分支、语言徽标和星星。 大多数终端设置已经运行了一个，因此请先尝试一下。 如果星形和分支字形显示为空框，请切换终端字体。

卸载

一行用于程序，一行用于数据。 历史存储和版本缓存位于 XDG 目录下，而不是二进制文件旁边，因此删除 whetuu 永远不会带走您的历史记录。 如果您想查看这两个位置，请先运行 whetuu 路径，以防 $XDG_DATA_HOME 或 $XDG_CACHE_HOME 将它们移动到您的计算机上。

$ rm ~/.local/bin/whetuu && rm -rf ~/.local/share/whetuu ~/.cache/whetuu

然后从 shell 配置中删除 #whetuu 块。

~/demo

在真实的 shell 中查看它

状态行跟踪分支、git 状态和工具链版本。 按向上箭头打开历史记录选择器，它会在您键入时进行过滤并运行您选择的内容。

demo

〜/模块

它显示了什么

从左到右，每个片段仅在相关时出现。

user_hostuser@host 以粗体绿色显示，但仅限通过 SSH 或当您是 root 时，然后以粗体红色作为警告。

目录当前目录 $HOME 折叠到 ~. 保留锚点以及适合宽度的尽可能多的尾随目录。

gitbranch分支字形和当前分支，或（分离），洋红色。

git state任何正在进行的操作，呈黄色：（变基 2/7）、（合并）、（择优挑选）。 直接从 .git 读取，没有额外的子进程。

git status 冲突、隐藏、暂存、修改、未跟踪、前面和后面，在一个括号内的组中。

采用品牌颜色的语言徽标和工具链版本，适用于 39 种语言和工具。 从项目清单、源文件扩展名或基础设施标记中检测到。

cmd_durationTimer 字形和经过的时间，当最后一个命令运行两秒或更长时间时。

字符一颗星，默认为紫色或语言品牌颜色。 命令失败后变为红色。

〜/选择器

向上箭头上的历史选择器

命令一旦完成就会被记录下来，并且只有在它们干净地退出时才会被记录，因此拼写错误永远不会进入商店。 每个都与其运行的目录一起存储。 选择器打开的范围仅限于当前目录，如果没有历史记录，则回退到所有历史记录。 刚刚中断的命令是唯一的例外。 在您运行另一个命令之前，它位于顶部红色，因此您可以选择它并修复它。 它永远不会被存储。

韦图历史

2d git commit -m "缓存工具链版本" 1d cd ~/cf/platform && git push -u origin HEAD 17h docker exec -i PGPASSWORD=x db psql 14m nvim ~/.config/fish/config.fish 11m npm ci ¡

行语法突出显示。 命令名称、标志、路径、变量、带引号的字符串和运算符均采用终端主题中的颜色，因此选择器与您已经运行的调色板相匹配。 对于窗口来说太宽的命令会失去其中间...... 而不是它的结尾，它使一系列命令共享一个长前缀。

  • 类型过滤器。 每个单词都必须匹配，忽略大小写。
  • ↑ / ↓ 移动选择。 Up 可以追溯到更早的时间。
  • Ctrl+G 在该目录的历史记录和所有目录之间切换。
  • 将所选内容复制到搜索字段中以进行编辑或扩展。 Enter 然后运行您输入的内容。
  • Enter 运行所选内容，或在 Tab 后键入的文本。 移动选择将返回到运行它。
  • EscCancel，保留您在命令行中输入的任何内容。

〜/命令

日常没什么可跑的

shell 钩子驱动所有东西，而选择器位于向上箭头上，因此其中两个会为您调用，而您无需键入它们。 这是整个命令界面。

命令Does
星星打印命令列表。
whetu--版本打印版本。
whetuu init <fish|bash|zsh>打印 shell 集成脚本，用于获取或评估。 当直接运行到终端时打印设置行。
渲染时渲染一根状态线。 由 shell hook 调用，而不是由您调用。
韦图历史打开交互式历史记录选择器。
whetuu 历史记录添加 -- <命令>记录完成的命令。 由 shell 钩子调用。
路径打印历史记录存储和版本缓存所在的位置，以及每个文件是否存在。

render 和history add 采用只有init 脚本才传递的标志，即退出状态、持续时间和宽度。 这就是为什么他们被排除在这里。

全新安装没有这两个文件。 whetuu 路径标记丢失的路径而不是隐藏它，直到记录第一个命令并缓存第一个工具链版本。 既没有 $HOME 也没有匹配的 XDG 变量集，它就是这样说的，因为那么 whetuu 无处可写。

〜/性能

渲染时间约为 2 毫秒

状态行在每个命令之前运行，这使得它成为 shell 中必须快速执行的一件事。 每个读取磁盘的模块都通过 std.Io 同时运行，因此渲染所需的时间大约与其最慢的探测时间相同，而不是它们的总和。

目录使成为用于比较
没有仓库，没有工具链2.3 ms—
Zig 存储库，35 个文件3.0 ms仅 Zig 版本：3.1 ms
Monorepo，8259 个文件20.2 ms仅 git status：19.3 毫秒

使用 hyperfine --warmup 40 -- 在第 13 代 i9-13900H、ReleaseFast 上运行 400 进行测量，固定到其他闲置计算机上的性能核心。 在 monorepo 中，整个状态行大约与 git status 本身一样长。

缓慢的存储库无法挂起您的 shell。 两个子流程都是有界的。 Git 需要 250 毫秒，工具链探针需要 200 毫秒，并且它们同时运行，因此最坏的情况是两者中较大的一个。 假设 git 挂起 30 秒，状态行仍会在 257 毫秒内返回。 它只是删除 git 段。

悠久的历史并不会减慢挑选者的速度。 向上箭头读取最近的几兆字节而不是整个存储，因此它在 70 MB 的存储上打开大约 20 毫秒，就像在 400 KB 的存储上一样。 为了保持这种状态，不会删除任何内容。 多年的历史记录保留在磁盘上。

〜/安全

没有任何东西离开你的机器

状态行可以看到您运行的每个命令，并且选择器会保留它们。 对于一个小工具来说，这是很多事情，所以这正是 whetuu 所做和不做的事情。

没有网络，没有套接字，没有 HTTP 客户端，二进制文件中的任何位置都没有同步。 没有遥测，也没有更新检查。 没有帐户和服务器可供选择退出。

两个文件运行时，whetuu 正好写入两个。 历史存储是使用模式 600 创建的，并在每次写入时重置为该历史存储，因此旧版本可读的历史存储会自行更正。 工具链版本字符串的缓存位于 ~/.cache/whetuu/versions，它不包含任何其他内容，并且可以随时删除。

仅规范路径二进制文件位于 ~/.local/bin 中，历史存储位于 $XDG_DATA_HOME 下，版本缓存位于 $XDG_CACHE_HOME 下。 您的 $HOME 中没有我们自己的目录。 whetuu paths 打印两个数据位置。

一次安装编辑安装程序将 init 行附加到 $SHELL 中 shell 的配置中，仅此而已。 不是您不使用的 shell 的配置，也不会使用两次。 仅当 ~/.local/bin 尚未在您的 PATH 上时，PATH 行才会加入它。 WHETUU_NO_MODIFY=1 使其打印它们。

跳过命令以空格开始命令，并且永远不会记录该命令。 将其用于携带令牌的人。 仅存储成功的命令。

没有 shell，everwhetuu 运行两个子进程：git 和工具链版本探测器。 两者都获得固定的参数列表而不是命令行，因此您键入的任何内容都不会被解释为命令。 像正在进行的变基这样的状态是直接从 .git 中读取的，根本没有子进程。

转义 defanged 命令、分支名称或目录中的每个控制字节都变成 ? 在它到达您的终端之前。 您刚刚克隆的存储库无法重新绘制屏幕或通过 whetuu 移动光标。

无需配置没有配置文件意味着没有配置解析器，没有主题格式，并且在启动时没有执行任何内容。 攻击面是二进制文件和上面的两个命令。

需要注意的是，语言模块会从当前目录中的文件中选择要探测的工具链，因此输入不受信任的存储库可能会使 whetuu 运行类似 node --version 的东西。 它运行您的 PATH 解析的任何内容，而不是存储库中的二进制文件。

可检查的下载 Linux 版本是静态 musl，没有运行时依赖性，每个版本都附带一个 SHA256SUMS 文件。 源代码位于 GitHub 上，并通过一个命令进行构建。
